notes: FP-011 implements validation and admission integration for FP-010 evidence records. Two append-only event tables record validation and admission evaluations without mutating original evidence records. Trust tier, validation state, and admission state remain independent axes. NOT_EVALUATED is rejected as a validation state but accepted as an admission state. All 247 tests pass including 57 new FP-011 tests and all existing FP-004, FP-005, FP-008, FP-009, and FP-010 tests.
